# Known problems

Current UX problems the team already knows about. Reviewers read this so they do not "discover"
accepted issues, and so fixes do not regress decided tradeoffs.

Format: one problem per line, with status.

```text
- [accepted] <problem we live with, and why>
- [open]     <problem nobody has fixed yet>
- [decided]  <tradeoff that looks like a bug but is a decision — link the decision if one exists>
```

- [open] (fill in)
